name: Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 6 ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the milk, melted margarine, and egg; stir until well mixed.
3. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Gently fold in the minced apple.
5. Spoon the batter into a nonstick muffin pan coated with cooking spray, filling each cup about two-thirds full.
6. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
Exchanges: 1 Starch 1/2 Fat
Serving size: 1 muffin
Per serving: Calories 102 Fiber 1gm Sodium 226mg Carbohydrates 17gm Cholesterol 16mg Protein 3gm Fat 3gm
